name: Counter
description: Animated number counter that smoothly transitions between values using spring physics. Each digit rolls independently with a slot-machine effect.

value.description: The target number to display and animate to.

fontSize.description: Font size of the digits in pixels.

padding.description: Vertical padding added to each digit's height.

places.description: Array of place values determining which digit positions to display. Use '.' for decimal point. Auto-detected from value if omitted.

borderRadius.description: Border radius of the counter container.

horizontalPadding.description: Horizontal padding of the counter container.

gradientHeight.description: Height of the top/bottom fade gradients in pixels.

gradientFrom.description: Starting color of the fade gradient (should match background).

gradientTo.description: Ending color of the fade gradient.

aiPromptHint: Counter animates between number values with a rolling digit effect. Set 'value' to the target number. Use 'places' to control which digit positions render. Match 'gradientFrom' to your background color for clean edge fading.
